name: cmt-remotion
description: CMT Detailing — Remotion video rendering templates + hosted render service

scripts.render: npx remotion render src/index.ts CMTBeforeAfterReel out/cmt-test-reel.mp4 --props src/sample-props.json --overwrite --codec h264
scripts.render:hq: npx remotion render src/index.ts CMTBeforeAfterReel out/cmt-test-reel.mp4 --props src/sample-props.json --overwrite --codec h264 --crf 18
